title: STAR
lyrics:

Mamaはtell me you're starboy
So i wanna change my life
いつもthinking about my dream
I don't need a hoe no more
Cocaine all night long
磨くぜ そうmy speedy lex
止められない もうno one yeah
周りはwanna kill my soul

So i wanna change my life

I don't need a hoe no more

磨くぜ そうmy speedy lex
止められない もうno one yeah

Cocaine in my ラボ all night long
Calling on my phone でも俺出ない
Codeine on my blood, feeling like a summer
だるそう 眠そう i don't give a fuck it

壁をfuck it now いつもi don't mind

She just see my wrist 目はレインボー

Walking like a queen
My wallet cannot stop
So shine bbs

No stop trying to be god hey boy
Please wake up
I don't wanna die, i don't wanna die
Please wake up
I don't wanna die, i don't wanna die
I don't wanna die

Mamaはtell me you're starboy

いつもthinking about my dream

止められない もうno one yeah
